allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Recurse -Filter "skills" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:APPDATA\\Claude" -Recurse -Filter "skills" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/news-data.json'\); console.log\('generatedAt:', d.generatedAt\); console.log\('stories:', d.stories?.length || 0\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const path=require\('path'\); const dir=path.join\('public','archive'\); if\(!fs.existsSync\(dir\)\)fs.mkdirSync\(dir,{recursive:true}\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('public/news-data.json'\); const meta=JSON.parse\(d\); const date=meta.generatedAt.slice\(0,10\); fs.writeFileSync\(path.join\(dir, date+'.json'\), d\); console.log\('Wrote', path.join\(dir, date+'.json'\)\);")

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --esModuleInterop --strict --skipLibCheck scripts/update-news.ts scripts/utils/dedup.ts scripts/utils/cluster.ts scripts/utils/logger.ts scripts/utils/issue.ts scripts/fetcher/rss-fetcher.ts scripts/fetcher/sources.ts scripts/analyzer/deepseek.ts scripts/analyzer/kimi.ts 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --esModuleInterop scripts/update-news.ts scripts/utils/archive-context.ts scripts/analyzer/prompt.ts scripts/analyzer/deepseek.ts scripts/analyzer/kimi.ts 2>&1)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --project NUL scripts/update-news.ts 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --target es2022 --moduleResolution bundler --types node scripts/utils/archive-context.ts scripts/analyzer/prompt.ts scripts/analyzer/deepseek.ts scripts/analyzer/kimi.ts scripts/update-news.ts 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --strict --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node scripts/update-news.ts scripts/utils/archive-context.ts scripts/analyzer/prompt.ts scripts/analyzer/deepseek.ts scripts/analyzer/kimi.ts 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --strict --target es2022 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node scripts/update-news.ts scripts/utils/archive-context.ts scripts/analyzer/prompt.ts scripts/analyzer/deepseek.ts scripts/analyzer/kimi.ts 2>&1)
